title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on sport, competition and values.

questions.question: Do you think professional sport places too much emphasis on winning at all costs, and how does this affect athletes and fans?
How important is sport as a tool for promoting social inclusion and bringing diverse communities together?

script.text: Do you think professional sport places too much emphasis on winning at all costs, and how does this affect athletes and fans?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
